languages.text: Тела выпотрошены и местами обглоданы. На костях видны неровные зазубрины — кто-то небрежно срезал с трупов ошметки плоти.

traits.locale_text: Тела выпотрошены и местами обглоданы. На костях видны неровные зазубрины — кто-то небрежно срезал с трупов ошметки плоти.
Тела выпотрошены и местами обглоданы. На костях видны неровные зазубрины — кто-то небрежно срезал с трупов ошметки плоти.

languages.text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.
languages.original_text: Тела выпотрошены и местами обглоданы. На костях видны неровные зазубрины — кто-то небрежно срезал с трупов ошметки плоти.

traits.locale_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.
The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.
The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: Die Leichen wurden ausgeweidet und an einigen Stellen aufgerissen. An einigen Knochen sind gezackte Kratzer zu sehen — jemand hat schlampig ganze Fleischstücke aus den Körpern herausgeschnitten.
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: Les corps ont été éviscérés et nettoyés par endroits. Certains os présentent des éraflures irrégulières — quelqu'un a négligemment découpé des morceaux entiers de chair sur les corps.
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: 尸体被开膛破肚，有些地方被剔得干干净净。一些骨头上有锯齿状的划痕--有人马马虎虎地从尸体上剔除了整块肉。
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: Los cuerpos fueron destripados y limpiados en algunas partes. Hay rasguños irregulares en algunos huesos: alguien arrancó descuidadamente trozos enteros de carne de los cuerpos.
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: 死体は内臓を抜き取られ、ところどころきれいに摘み取られていた。いくつかの骨にはギザギザの傷があり、誰かが遺体から肉の塊を丸ごと切り取ったのだ。
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.

languages.text: Cesetlerin içleri boşaltılmış ve bazı yerleri temizlenmiş. Bazı kemiklerde pürüzlü çizikler var — birileri özensizce cesetlerden et parçalarının tamamını oymuş.
languages.original_text: The bodies were gutted and picked clean in some places. There are jagged scratches on some of the bones — somebody sloppily carved out entire chunks of flesh from the bodies.
